---
title: "Home"
---

Embedding slide templates here for ease of access.

## Slide Template \#1

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slide-content/template-slide-01.html" height="420" width="750" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

Slides -- [Full Screen](slide-content/template-slide-01.qmd)
